form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, hung in on scoring up, was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr7) over 2080m at Cranbourne beaten 30 m by Platinum Jive (2:30.90) in NR 56 to 64 on April 3 at $34. Before that 10th (Fr2) over 2150m after showing early pace at Birchip, well beaten by Shadow Celt (2:38.00) in 4yo+ NR up to 90 on March 8 at $26. Hard to have.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in through the score up and out of position at the start.
Tired to be beaten 125m.
Hung in raced inside the final marker peg.
Gave ground over the final stages to finish in 12th position, beaten 50.9m.
Hung in score up and out of position at the start as a consequence.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 6th (Fr2) over 2240m at this track, beaten 10 m by Bulletproof Boy (2:45.60) in No NR on April 4 at $151. Before that was well back in the run when 6th (Fr5) over 1650m at Bendigo beaten 10 m by Dangerous (1:57.20) in NR 65 or better on March 25 at $31. Not here.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for a clear run until approaching 200m before using the sprint lane.
Shifted up the track under pressure in the final straight.
Weakened noticeably inside the final 700m to be beaten 97.1m.
Raced wide in the early stages. Tired, beaten 124m.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a game effort when 2nd (Fr6) over 1650m at Bendigo beaten 1.5 m by Dangerous (1:57.20) in NR 65 or better on March 25 at $14. Draws well and is working towards a win.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Finished in 7th and last position beaten 13.9m.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of six months. Finished off last campaign recording by a head after showing early speed, (Fr1) at this track (2:01.00) beating Delightful Star in G3 No NR M on October 18 at $3.60 at the bell was leading 3.7m on the pegs. Previous preparation first-up won by a nose (Sr2) at this track (2:02.40) beating Wings On The Line in NR up to 79 M on July 5 at $4.20. Drawn to advantage and ha yet to miss a place in five fresh attempts.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 250m, paced roughly when coming together with Perun.

form.formComment: Solid run when beaten by 2.25 m finishing third after a quick start, behind Fighter Command at this track over 1720m in a No NR on March 21 at $16. Then a handy effort when beaten by 6 m finishing second behind Meteor Moth at this track over 2240m in a NR up to 100 on March 28 at $3.20. Continues to race well and should get his chance from this draw.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 7th (Fr5) over 2680m after showing early speed at Terang, beaten 25 m by Jilliby Nitro (3:15.60) in No NR on March 27 at $34. Before that failed to finish when he ran at Mt Gambier on March 14 over 2190m. Not keen on his chances in this field.

form.formComment: Last start by 5.5 m when driven back in the field, (Fr4) held up early, at this track (2:37.50) beating Catch A Wave in No NR on February 28 at $5.50 at the bell was 5th-16.07. Back in winning form and with even luck from a wide draw could strike again.
